body:
Apparently, the `field` function does not work with `OffsetArrays` on GPUs because of scalar indexing problems. 
See https://buildkite.com/clima/climaocean-ci/builds/5381#019b2657-9052-46e2-8e03-bd9cc5bd0b52

This PR fixes `field` and adds some tests.
title: Correct field constructor to work with OffsetArrays
